title: Luffy Enters Queen’s Deadly Prison Game
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Orochi, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Beast Pirates, Luffy, Kid as The Flower Capital erupts around Orochi and Komurasaki while Luffy is forced into Queen’s brutal prison games.
scene: Queen turns Udon into a spectacle while Luffy and Hyogoro are forced to survive a deadly punishment game.

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Top Courtesan Komurasaki is dead!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WAAAH! The idol of our country is gone!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She was too far a dream for me, so I never even got to see her face!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Boss Kyoshirou was the one who cut her down!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'll never forgive him!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quiet, you fool! If anyone from the group hears you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you hear?! About the ghosts in the riot?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: They were woken by the lightning strike!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: WAAA AAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Konura- Saakiii!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Why are you crying?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You only met her once!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: HIC... WAAH...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The death of a beautiful lady is a grave loss to the entire world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Looks like the funeral's tomorrow. A

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you have any silver of sensitivity in your soul?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think O-Robi and the others were there when it happened. Think they're alright?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Probably.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, why don't you try contacting them with that thing?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The "Smartsnail!" It's a mobile train- sponder snail, Wano's version of the Den Den den mushi!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Women's Bath... Traffy! You got any news about Udon? About Luffytarou?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, yeah! He's probably about to blow his fuse from impatience right now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hah, yeah! We should meet up with him soon!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...nothing about "Strawhat"... but there's something about Eustass kidd...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Women's Bath...!! He was in Wano, too?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was allied with Hawkins, so it actually shouldn't be too surprising.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But he's in a completely different position now...

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: He broke out of prison.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By the way, do you know where the public bathhouse is?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get your head out of the damn clouds already!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Wano _ UDon _ Prisoner's Mine

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: Prisoner Eustass KIDD has escaped!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyone who aided him, or anyone with information, come forward!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Though he did get out, what a poorly planned escape!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He didn't even get his seasons handcuffs off!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Fool

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Foo!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You didn't help him, did you? You two talked often.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll catch him soon enough. And when we do, he's in for a world of pain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: He's getting the death penalty, the fool!

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: GADLER (Gifters) Alpacaman Alpaca smile

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: GROSS!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Showing Defiance?! Do you need some remediation?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One infraction results in both your arms being cut off! »

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Two calls for both legs!jJ

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Stop it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: He'll die!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I am not sure if this is

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Please stop!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: He's an old man!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: HOFF... HOFF...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: No cheating, ya old fart!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: My... my precious...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You only get to eat as much as you work! Them's the rules!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yup, that's right.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And if you can't work, then man up and starve to death!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Kibi DANGO...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Alright old man, I know you can barely lift a small boulder...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So how exactly did you obtain this many food tickets?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: HOFF... munch...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Chew Chew

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Deli- Claus!...so... Good!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The hell are you doing eating?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: MMPH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: SPIT IT OUT, OLD MAN!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You don't have the right to eat shit!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ur...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: GH...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'll never spit it out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: that man gave these Dango to me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: GMPH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I won't spit out a single one!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Prison and Capital Crisis storyline with 73 dialogue beats. Orochi’s paranoia and Queen’s prison game raise the stakes on both sides of Wano.
